response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video and identified two distinct vocal performances separated by a dialogue scene. 
2. Used the on-screen text to identify the songs: "Weight of the World" (from NieR: Automata) and "ROCK IN!" by Koseki Bijou.
3. Conducted web searches: `"Weight of the World" NieR Automata Japanese and English lyrics` and `"ROCK IN!" Koseki Bijou lyrics`.
4. Extracted the lyrics from the search results, ensuring the "Weight of the World" section used a bilingual combination matching the video's presentation, and the "ROCK IN!" lyrics covered the song as it appears in the video.
5. Structured the data into the requested JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video features a two-song performance by Koseki Bijou, a VTuber. The first song is a bilingual cover of "Weight of the World" from the *NieR: Automata* soundtrack. This is followed by a brief dialogue transition. The second song is an original track titled "ROCK IN!" by Koseki Bijou.

scenes.description: Koseki Bijou performs a bilingual cover of 'Weight of the World' from NieR: Automata, with subtitles displaying a mix of English and Japanese lyrics.
scenes.song_title: Weight of the World (壊レタ世界ノ歌)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
そう僕らは今
ああ 無意味でも願う
ただ君との未来を

そう僕らは今
ああ 無意味でも願う
ただ君との時間を

祈りよ
愛しを
得られずとも
My dreams will come to life

僕は
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Cause we're gonna shout it loud
Even if our words seem meaningless
It's like I'm carrying the weight of the world

Still, we're gonna shout it loud
Even if our words seem meaningless
It's like I'm carrying the weight of the world

I hope that somehow
That I could save every one of us
Maybe if I keep believing
My dreams will come to life

scenes.description: Dialogue between Koseki Bijou and a digital entity.
Koseki Bijou performs her original song 'ROCK IN!', with on-screen lyrics appearing throughout.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Biboo's here to play
Yeah, uh-huh
Ah, ah
Let's go

Woke up in the morning
I had a funny dream
I was a stone that had been thrown
No way back, I was all in

What if that was me soaring straight to the top?
Let's take a chance, game on, and shoot my shot
Log in, get good, you mad?
Let's look, talk beep, get hit, clean sweep

Now you know what's up
Hit 'em with a one-two-three, Biboo, Biboo
Come and test your luck
Yeah, we're comin' in clutch, Biboo, Biboo

Skipping stone in flight
Take 'em out, one-shot, Biboo, Biboo
Come and help me fight
Get on up, let's go, just me and you

Player one and player two
We'll see this through
Close my eyes, make a wish
One more shot, I will not miss

Rock in!

Level up, we go onwards
Aiming for another win
A diamond in the rough, it's kinda tough
You gotta keep on rollin'

The grind goes on and on, no breaks
Seal the cracks with a few band-aids
I'll try over and over and over again
Just one more round, please?
